narrative_role: Atto I, presentazione dei personaggi. La competenza che diventa visibile.

prompt_components.subject: Four figures on the deck of an antique sailing ship, all seen from behind or in heavy backlight, faces in shadow
prompt_components.action: one ties a rope into a complex knot, one peers through a brass spyglass at the horizon, one writes with a quill pen in a heavy leather-bound logbook, one grips a wooden wheel with both weathered hands
prompt_components.environment: ship deck in soft morning light, wooden planks, cream sails partially visible above, ocean horizon in distance
prompt_components.camera_movement: slow dolly forward, gentle, ending at medium framing of the four figures
prompt_components.lighting: warm diffused morning light from low east, long backlit shadows on the deck, characters as silhouettes against pale cream sky
prompt_components.mood: competent, methodical, the dignity of skilled work
prompt_components.audio_hint: rope creaking through wooden pulleys, quill scratching on parchment, soft ocean waves, gentle wind in sails, occasional distant gull

acceptance_criteria: Tutti e 4 i personaggi visibili ma con volti non chiari
Audio Veo include almeno 2 dei suoni di lavoro
